name: research-autopilot
description: VELA workflow core for Codex research projects with routing, evidence discipline, and review gates.

interface.shortDescription: Use VELA project structure, route explanations, evidence discipline, and explicit review gates in Codex.
interface.longDescription: VELA Workflow Core supports the portable VELA research environment. It explains the route before execution, upgrades project-shaped work into readable coordination, and keeps citation, writing, social-evidence, and reproducibility workflows behind explicit contracts.
defaultPrompt: Route this research task automatically and explain the plan before execution.
Show which research route, quality gates, and profiles this task needs.
Turn this project task into a structured multi-agent dispatch.
